branches.name: plus
branches.changelog:
v1.6.1 (plus)

Linux:
- Fixed not handling spaces on some VGUI2 labels

Engine:
- Blocked .ps1/.sh files from downloading
- Hidden pause pic in Condition Zero career

GameUI:
- Added Steam networking checkbox with note (thanks to @Armacadia)
- Added HL25 hostname when creating server ("Someone's Server")
- Fixed broken console color patch for BugfixedHL-Rebased

FriendsUI:
- Actually deployed on Windows platform, I'm so sorry, guys ;)

ServerBrowser:
- Now server sort happens by country flag (if tapping Name tab)
- Added AG color tags support
- Added server rules tab for game info dialog
- Reworked blacklist tab, now it also accepts plain text of IP:port strings
- Fixed multiple servers selection
- Moved master filter to the right side
